message:
fix(search): skip single-char ngrams in edge ngram generation

The generate_edge_ngrams function was producing 1-character ngrams which
aren't useful for search and caused the test
`generate_edge_ngrams_handles_short_string` to fail.

Changed minimum indices from 2 to 3 and iteration from indices[1..] to
indices[2..] so ngrams start at length 2 as expected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
